message:
fix(core): fresh-eyes review fixes for in-transaction INSERT fast path

1. Remove unused _previous_total_changes and _previous_last_insert_rowid
   from bd-pktso fast path (saves 2 RefCell borrows = ~10ns/row)

2. Add prefers_reusable_table_program filter to bd-pktso fast path.
   Without this, multi-column INSERTs with complex expressions (string
   concat) would bypass the VDBE reuse path and take the slower
   direct-simple-insert path with per-row AST re-evaluation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
